analyze-lp.description: Analyze a landing page for CRO issues. Submit a URL, local file path, or screenshot.

learn-from-review.description: Feed in your expert CRO review (video transcript, notes, or annotated screenshots) so the agent learns your analysis style and insights.

competitor-teardown.description: Compare your landing page against a competitor's. Head-to-head across 8 persuasion dimensions with a steal list and winning copy.

audience-rewrite.description: Rewrite a landing page's copy for a specific audience persona. Same product, different story.

before-after.description: Re-analyze a page after changes. Shows score movement, tracks recommendations acted on, flags regressions.

build-lp.description: Build a high-converting landing page from scratch with structured intake, strategy brief, and mobile-first code.

clone-lp.description: Replicate an existing landing page as a faithful HTML/CSS reproduction. Extracts design system, maps sections, builds pixel-accurate replica.

reskin-lp.description: Rebuild your product's landing page in the style of another brand's page. Reference structure + your product's improved story.

learn-from-page.description: Analyze an exemplary landing page and extract reusable CRO patterns into the swipe file.

export-report.description: Export the latest CRO analysis report as a standalone HTML or Markdown file for sharing with the team.
